originalTitle: Nigeria charges six people with treason over Independence Day coup plot
title: Nigeria charges six people with treason over Independence Day coup plot
content: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.

originalTitle: South Africa's police boss charged in connection with controversial health contract
title: South Africa's police boss charged in connection with controversial health contract
content: Fannie Masemola is accused of failing in his duties to provide proper oversight in his role.

originalTitle: Arrests in Nigeria after abduction of local monarch 'held for ransom'
title: Arrests in Nigeria after abduction of local monarch 'held for ransom'
content: The kidnappers raided his palace on Saturday and are believed to be holding him in a forest.

originalTitle: Nigeria charges six people with ‘terrorism’, treason over 2025 coup plot
title: Nigeria charges six people with ‘terrorism’, treason over 2025 coup plot
content: Nigerian authorities have charged six military officers over an alleged plot to overthrow President Bola Tinubu.

title: Iran’s World Cup participation depends on team’s safety in the US: Minister
content: Iran's team is preparing for the FIFA World Cup but may not travel to the tournament, Sport Minister Donyamali says.

originalTitle: Israeli soldiers and settlers kill 11 Palestinians across Gaza, West Bank
title: Israeli soldiers and settlers kill 11 Palestinians across Gaza, West Bank
content: In Hebron, a 16-year-old is struck by a vehicle escorting an Israeli minister and killed.

originalTitle: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
content: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

originalTitle: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
content: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.

originalTitle: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
content: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.

content: With a World Cup summer fast approaching, BBC Sport looks at which Premier League stars may be looking for new clubs.

content: Stumping up world record sums doesn't always guarantee success, but plenty of football's most expensive players have delivered on their hefty fees -  here are the top 10.

originalTitle: Brady steps down as West Ham vice-chair
title: Brady steps down as West Ham vice-chair
content: Baroness Karren Brady steps down as vice-chair of Premier League side West Ham after 16 years.
